$comment: Discovery Bay (CA) Golf & Country Club neighborhood — layout spec for procedural Roblox build. Coordinates are a SCHEMATIC SKELETON captured from Google Maps satellite; treat them as relative placement + topology, and refine exact edges against the live satellite while building. See the .svg trace files for visual reference.

meta.place: Discovery Bay Golf & Country Club, Discovery Bay, California
meta.satelliteReference: Google Maps -> search 'Discovery Bay Golf & Country Club' -> Satellite view

coordinateSystem.grid: Top-down normalized grid, 0..1000 on both axes.
coordinateSystem.z: 0 = south, 1000 = north (north is up, matching the trace SVGs)
coordinateSystem.mapToRoblox: Roblox world Vector3(X, Y, Z): X = gridX * worldScale, Z = (1000 - gridZ) * worldScale (flip so +Z can stay north or south per your camera), Y = elevation. Keep it consistent.

worldScale.meaning: studs per grid unit. 4.0 -> ~4000 x 4000 stud world, roughly true-scale for the ~225-acre core plus lagoons at 1 stud = 1 ft.

elevations.note: Land sits just above water; roads a hair above land to avoid z-fighting.

zones.name: Fairway housing rows
zones.note: Overlaps golf core; houses line each fairway.

water.lagoonNote: The interior lagoon maze is too intricate to encode as exact polygons. Generate winding channels between the peninsula land-fingers by tracing the satellite; keep a uniform channel width (~30-45 studs) and a single water depth. The lagoon/marina trace SVG shows representative finger shapes.

courts.note: Cul-de-sac courts branch off the spines. Place each as a short stub (~60-120 studs) with a house row; exact positions per the trace SVGs.

landmarks.name: Clubhouse
landmarks.note: Large parking lot on NE side (~95x60 studs).

landmarks.name: Marina / Yacht Club
landmarks.note: Covered boat slips (5+ long rectangles) + moored boats.

landmarks.name: Discovery Bay Lighthouse
landmarks.note: North Delta entrance; small hero landmark.

landmarks.name: Callahan's Coffee and Cones
landmarks.note: REQUIRED build. Coffee & ice-cream shop, in the Discovery Bay Blvd / Riverlake Rd plaza just NW of the Community Center.

landmarks.name: Discovery Bay Jiu Jitsu
landmarks.address: near Sand Point Rd / Community Center
landmarks.note: REQUIRED build. Storefront/studio unit near the Community Center, same commercial cluster.

landmarks.name: Shell Gas Station
landmarks.address: 1502 Discovery Bay Blvd, Discovery Bay, CA 94505
landmarks.note: REQUIRED build. Fuel canopy + pumps + kiosk, corner of Discovery Bay Blvd, adjacent to Callahan's. Open till midnight (24-ish).

landmarks.name: Convenience Mart
landmarks.address: 1502 Discovery Bay Blvd, Discovery Bay, CA 94505
landmarks.note: REQUIRED build. The convenience store co-located with the Shell (appears on maps as 'Michael's Market' / 'Dash'). Build as the store attached to the gas station.

requiredBusinesses.note: The user requires these four in the final build — do not omit any. CONFIRMED via satellite: all four sit in ONE commercial plaza at the corner of Discovery Bay Blvd & Riverlake Rd, immediately NW of the Discovery Bay Community Center. Build them as a single small strip-mall cluster: Shell station + its Convenience Mart on the Discovery Bay Blvd frontage, with Callahan's and the Jiu Jitsu studio as adjacent storefront units. Add a SurfaceGui/sign with each name.

lots.pattern: road -> row of houses -> fairway OR lagoon -> next row
lots.waterfrontFacing: toward water; street lots face the road

houseKit.reuseRule: Place as duplicated instances of the same Model so Roblox can optimize.
